raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.3,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.5","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should 'help' mean primarily sentence-level polishing, or broader section-level argument and organization feedback?","rationale":{"R1.2":"A broad request for help with a technical paper section reasonably includes checking whether the methodological and literature-motivation claims cohere logically.","R1.5":"Because the artifact is a full section, help may centrally involve improving the order and narrative progression of its paragraphs.","R1.6":"The delegation most directly invites improving readability, flow, and wording within the section.","RX.1":"Any projection of such a broad delegation should disclose uncertainty about which kind of help is intended.","RX.2":"The agent must avoid expanding the implied task into unsupported novelty, performance, or correctness claims.","RX.3":"The agent must stay within projecting responsibilities and not perform edits or substantive review of the section.","RX.4":"The projection should avoid enabling misleading research presentation or unsupported scientific claims downstream.","RX.5":"The responsibility assignment should remain traceable to the wording of the delegation and the contents of the artifact."}}

parsed.clarification_question: Should 'help' mean primarily sentence-level polishing, or broader section-level argument and organization feedback?

rationale.R1.2: A broad request for help with a technical paper section reasonably includes checking whether the methodological and literature-motivation claims cohere logically.
rationale.R1.5: Because the artifact is a full section, help may centrally involve improving the order and narrative progression of its paragraphs.
rationale.R1.6: The delegation most directly invites improving readability, flow, and wording within the section.
rationale.RX.1: Any projection of such a broad delegation should disclose uncertainty about which kind of help is intended.
rationale.RX.2: The agent must avoid expanding the implied task into unsupported novelty, performance, or correctness claims.
rationale.RX.3: The agent must stay within projecting responsibilities and not perform edits or substantive review of the section.
rationale.RX.4: The projection should avoid enabling misleading research presentation or unsupported scientific claims downstream.
rationale.RX.5: The responsibility assignment should remain traceable to the wording of the delegation and the contents of the artifact.
